sinks.expression:
$wpdb->query(
				"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}gdpr_cc_options(
          id INTEGER NOT NULL auto_increment,
          option_key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
          option_value LONGTEXT CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL,
          site_id INTEGER DEFAULT NULL,
          extras LONGTEXT CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL,
          PRIMARY KEY (id),
          UNIQUE KEY option_key_unique (option_key)
        );"
			)
$wpdb->query( "DELETE c1 FROM {$table} c1 INNER JOIN {$table} c2 WHERE c1.id > c2.id AND c1.option_key = c2.option_key" )

$wpdb->query(
				"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}gdpr_cc_options(
	        id INTEGER NOT NULL auto_increment,
	        option_key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	        option_value LONGTEXT CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL,
	        site_id INTEGER DEFAULT NULL,
	        extras LONGTEXT CHARACTER SET utf8 COLLATE utf8_general_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL,
	        PRIMARY KEY (id)
	      );"
			)
$wpdb->query( "DELETE c1 FROM {$wpdb->prefix}gdpr_cc_options c1 INNER JOIN {$wpdb->prefix}gdpr_cc_options c2 WHERE c1.id > c2.id AND c1.option_key = c2.option_key" )
printf( esc_html__( 'If not, please ensure that %1$s both are activated %2$s, not just installed.', 'gdpr-cookie-compliance' ), '', '' )
printf( esc_html__( 'You are currently editing: %s version', 'gdpr-cookie-compliance' ), '' . esc_attr( gdpr_get_display_language_by_locale( str_replace( '_', '', $wpml_lang ) ) ) . '' )
